choose.when: ORDER BY c.city_name ASC, ut.created_at DESC, ut.id DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY ut.created_at DESC, ut.id DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT ut.id AS id, ut.city_id AS cityId, c.city_name AS cityName, ut.trip_name AS tripName, ut.start_name AS startName, ut.end_name AS endName, ut.start_date AS startDate, ut.end_date AS endDate, ut.days AS days, ut.transport_type AS transportType, ut.plan_mode AS planMode, ut.total_distance AS totalDistance, ut.total_trip_duration AS totalDuration, ut.cover_url AS coverUrl, ut.is_public AS isPublic, ut.share_token AS shareToken, ut.created_at AS createdAt FROM user_trip ut LEFT JOIN city c ON ut.city_id = c.id WHERE
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_trip ut LEFT JOIN city c ON ut.city_id = c.id WHERE
